attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME)  FROM $$GGACML.CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS)

             FROM 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS STG_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS,
 (
 select CODE_COMBINATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
 minus
 select CODE_COMBINATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = STG_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
 and
 ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME = STG_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
